insight: In a game with Steelsplitters and Apollo, the intended sequence of clicking two Steelsplitters to attack a Gauss Cannon, having Apollo snipe the damaged Gauss Cannon, then clicking remaining Steelsplitters to attack the second Gauss Cannon does not work — clicking the remaining Steelsplitter cancels the Apollo action. This was replicated by community members and confirmed as a consistent behavior, though whether it is a bug or intended design is disputed.
author: itsotter
context: itsotter encountered this in a bot game and raised it; extratricky stated it has always worked this way, while Greyman planned to ask elyot for clarification.

insight: When using Apollo alongside Steelsplitters, the game enforces a strict ordering: all attack actions must be committed either entirely before or entirely after the Apollo snipe. You cannot interleave partial Steelsplitter attacks with an Apollo activation to redirect remaining attack to a second target.
author: extratricky
context: Follow-up thread clarifying the mechanics of interleaving Apollo snipes with Steelsplitter attacks against multiple Gauss Cannons.

insight: Antima Comet's optimal timing depends on supply and opponent's ability to rush it down: get it later if the opponent cannot rush it quickly, and sooner if you can rush the opponent after acquiring it. The goal is to maximize Antima size.
author: Deleted User
context: Discussion of how to play Antima Comet/Sentinel sets and when to time the Comet purchase.

insight: Thorium Dynamo is considered by community members to be one of the strongest units in the game: it is extremely gold-efficient, counters most broken combos, and can itself contribute to broken combos, making it a near-mandatory first pick in any exclusive-access draft format.
author: xyotsuba
context: Discussion about a proposed draft format where players exclusively pick units, highlighting Dynamo as a unit that warps any draft.

insight: Expert Bot is recommended as a meaningful stepping stone between the campaign/advanced exercises and Master Bot, as many players who beat Expert Bot consistently still lose regularly to Master Bot. Master Bot difficulty is significantly higher than Expert Bot.
author: consensus
context: Community discussion around a new player onboarding guide, with amalloy, supergreyman, and willflame all agreeing Expert Bot should precede Master Bot in the progression.
